form.layout: ==========>baseInfo[基本信息]====== voucherId[凭证ID] lineNo[行号] subjectId[科目ID] subjectCode[科目编码] subjectName[科目名称] dcDirection[借贷方向] ==========>amount[金额信息]====== debitAmount[借方金额(本位币)] creditAmount[贷方金额(本位币)] currencyId[币种] exchangeRate[汇率] amountSource[源币种金额] amountFunctional[本位币金额] ==========>auxiliary[辅助核算]====== partnerId[辅助-往来单位] departmentId[辅助-部门] projectId[辅助-项目] warehouseId[辅助-仓库] materialId[辅助-物料] costCenterId[成本中心] businessType[业务类型] ==========^audit[审计信息]========= acctSchemaId[账套] orgId[核算组织] memo[摘要] createdBy[创建人] createTime[创建时间] updatedBy[修改人] updateTime[修改时间]

==========>baseInfo[基本信息]====== voucherId[凭证ID] lineNo[行号] subjectId[科目ID] subjectCode[科目编码] subjectName[科目名称] dcDirection[借贷方向] ==========>amount[金额信息]====== debitAmount[借方金额(本位币)] creditAmount[贷方金额(本位币)] currencyId[币种] exchangeRate[汇率] amountSource[源币种金额] amountFunctional[本位币金额] ==========>auxiliary[辅助核算]====== partnerId[辅助-往来单位] departmentId[辅助-部门] projectId[辅助-项目] warehouseId[辅助-仓库] materialId[辅助-物料] costCenterId[成本中心] businessType[业务类型] acctSchemaId[账套] orgId[核算组织] memo[摘要]

form.title: 查询条件
form.layout: voucherId[凭证ID] subjectId[科目ID] dcDirection[借贷方向]
